evidence_refs.source_quote: 41,000 weekday riders – 7th busiest bus route in city

quarantine.note: Cited block p002_c0004 raw text ('41,000 weekday riders – 7th busiest bus route in city') does not explicitly mention 'B44' or 'SBS'. The relation to route_b44-sbs (service_variant: sbs) relies on document-level co-occurrence in a CB9 SBS presentation, not on block-level evidence. Per instructions, co-occurrence in a document is not a relation. Additionally, in September 2011 the B44 SBS was still proposed (launched Nov 2013), so the ridership metric describes the existing B44 Limited/Local service, not the SBS variant — yet the do_not_merge list explicitly separates route_b44-local from route_b44-sbs.
